name: Bluffton Family Recreation Sports and Fitness
description: Bluffton Family Recreation Sports and Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bluffton, OH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Bradfield Center
description: Bradfield Center is a place to play pickleball in Lima, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Collett Street Recreation Area Tennis Courts
description: Collett Street Recreation Area Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lima, OH. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Lima Family YMCA
description: Lima Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Lima, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Lima YMCA Annex
description: Lima YMCA Annex is a place to play pickleball in Lima, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Senior Services Center
description: Come play pickleball at Senior Services Center in Lima, OH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
hours: Monday-Thursday 8:00 am – 4:30 pm Friday 8:00 am – 2:30 pm Saturday and Sunday Closed Phone Number: (419) 991 8811 View our Newsletter!

name: Westwood Tennis and Fitness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Westwood Tennis and Fitness Center in Lima, OH! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
